G.Ramona is more situational than her OG so she's better w a more developed roster. OG Ramona's Exalt always gives you a 0 cost card of your choice, and because it's tied to Exalt, you can activate it every turn. G.Ramona has a similar effect tied but it's on one of her basic cards, so you have to rng to pull it, it'll only reduce the cost by 1, and it's limited to cards in your draw pile. Her gimmick is having a triggering bonus effect every 3-ish turns (Think of it like Ultra teams' Leap mechanic?) so you get the full "card of your choice 0 cost" every 3 turns. 

Queen's Sword is actually pretty decent for stacking Power too when you don't have a built up roster, and she's quite self-sufficient? G.Ramona's dmg takes a bit longer to scale up and prefers having extra support on the side bc her sword is wayyy more dps-focused
